$comment: Layer D for SETTLE: static data-flow equivalence between the IR and migrated candidate A (OCCURS affine subscripts + subscripted MOVE). The table W-ITEM is one logical region: its four cells (filled by four subscripted MOVEs from NUMVAL) union into input positions 0..3, and the strided reference W-ITEM(2*I) derives from that region. W-PAID sums it; W-FEE adds the 2% rate, the /100 shift, and half-up rounding.
